title: taeillo makes furniture acquisition easy, launches FlexiPay
description: Incessantly referencing the negative effect of the pandemic on businesses and individuals is gradually seeming like an overkill. However, we cannot shy away from the reality, which is the fact that th
html:
Incessantly referencing the negative effect of the pandemic on businesses and individuals is gradually seeming like an overkill. However, we cannot shy away from the reality, which is the fact that the pandemic affected the lifestyle and financial capability of a lot of people across the world.

Think of those who got a pay cut, those who got laid off, and businesses that are yet to get back on their feet as a result of restrictions and new regulations to mention a few.

Indisputably, the purchasing attitude of customers/buyers has seen a drastic change in the last couple of months due to a lot of unprecedented circumstances like the aforementioned. Ironically, despite these changes, people still want to maintain their lifestyle but the question remains how?

Seeing this gap ,taeillo, a tech enabled furniture company has launched an installment payment plan to help create purchasing ease for its customers. FlexiPay, a payment system that allows customers to shop for their favorite taeillo furniture and pay at their convenience was launched on the 11th of March 2022.

Speaking about the plan, Jumoke Dada, founder of taeillo said; as an empathic brand, we understand that revenues have become more uncertain due to a lot of circumstances in the country and across the world.

“People who need furniture might be unable to pay for it at a go, that is why we have created this plan to accommodate everyone. With this plan, customers can order for their preferred furniture and pay in up to 3 installments; with no extra charges, no interests, no BVN and no long process”.

Basically, there has been a shift in the purchasing power of a typical consumer – from what they invest in and how they pay. For many retailers, customers have gone from a fairly predictable demographic to a more moving demographic who would only tilt to brands that help them save or plan their finances better. She added. Click here https://taeillo.com/pages/flexipay for more details
